title: cleome bungei
intro: Cleome bungei, also known as Spurred Cleome, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Cleomaceae family. Traditionally, Cleome bungei has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, as well as acting as a natural remedy for sore throats. Cleome bungei can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments.
